items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev moves forward less frequently and tends to sit back and move his head more compared to Bogdan Guskov.
items.quote: You don't really see Magame do that, especially as of late. He kind of sits back, moves his head.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev has tight uppercuts and hooks when fighting on the inside.
items.quote: When he is inside, he's ripping. He he he's got tight uppercuts and hooks he'll throw.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev is known for his long straight two down the pipe from the southpaw stance.
items.quote: he's known for the long straight two down the pipe. Southpaw, right?

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev is a hard kicker who will kick through blocks.
items.quote: he is a pretty hard kicker. He'll kick through blocks as well.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev works well on the fence and is a good round winner.
items.quote: And he does work on the fence, guys. He's a good round winner.

items.claim: Abu Bakr Viev will outbox Said Ismagilov and have better cardio.
items.quote: Abu Bakr Veayv outboxing Saged is Isizagv and also having better cardio than him getting it done via decision.
